lines: Long ago, every creature and every valley sang as one.
The world was bound by an ancient force — The Chorus.
Then came The Fracture.
The bond shattered. Regions fell silent. Memories were lost.
The creatures that remained are called Harmons.
Each one carries a fragment of the old world's song.
Now strange signals ripple across the Routes.
Ruins awaken. Harmons grow restless.
Something beneath the valley is stirring again.
Some say a faction called The Veil watches from the shadows.
They believe restoring The Chorus could doom us all.
The truth is buried deeper than any Route.
You arrive at Harmona Rest — a village at the edge of the unknown.
Route Rangers guard what remains. Only the worthy earn Resonance Sigils.
Your journey to restore the valley begins now.
Harmona Rest — a cozy village wrapped in tall grass and old songs.
Explorers gather here before venturing into the wild Routes.
Your Harmon stirs at your touch.
A faint melody echoes between you — the first note of a bond.
Head north through the gate to Route 1.
Find wild Harmons, challenge Rangers, and uncover what broke The Chorus.
The valley is waiting.
